event.name: Build Guild Tanta
event.tagline: Build, compete, and connect with hardware builders in Tanta
event.description: A one-day Build Guild experience in Tanta where Hack Clubbers meet, build hardware projects, and learn from each other.

activities.title: What To Expect
activities.subtitle: Hands-on hardware projects, team challenges, mentorship from experienced organizers, networking with peers, and fun rewards throughout the day

partners.title: Built By Local Clubs
partners.subtitle: This guild is organized by student clubs in Gharbiya STEM School.

venue.title: Venue
venue.subtitle: Location details for Build Guild Tanta to be announced soon
venue.mapPlaceholder: Map embed will appear here when venue details are finalized.

about.title: What Is A Build Guild?
about.intro: Build Guilds is a worldwide series of student-led hardware meetups powered by Hack Club happening in 180 cities around the globe. For one day, you’ll join other builders to create, experiment, and share ideas—no experience needed, just curiosity and passion.
about.details: Our Tanta guild is organized by Gharbiya STEM Hack Club in collaboration with Gharbiya STEM Robo Club, bringing together students from across the city for a full day of hands-on building, collaboration, and real engineering experience.

organizers.name: Gharbiya STEM Hack Club
organizers.description: The Hack Club chapter at Gharbiya STEM School leads the local guild experience.

organizers.name: Gharbiya STEM Robo Club
organizers.description: The robotics club at Gharbiya STEM School helping shape activities and logistics.

activities.title: Explore hardware systems & CAD design
activities.description: Tackle hands-on hardware projects and CAD challenges, showcasing your creativity and technical skills.

activities.title: Hacktone & Mini Competitions
activities.description: Fast-paced challenges and team competitions with prizes for creativity and skill.

activities.title: Team Collaboration
activities.description: Form teams, brainstorm ideas, and work together on projects throughout the day.

activities.title: Fun, Rewards & Free Food
activities.description: Enjoy surprises, rewards, and complimentary food while connecting with other builders.

defaultActivities.title: Hands-On Build Time
defaultActivities.description: Collaborative project sessions focused on hardware prototypes and experiments.

defaultActivities.title: Lightning Showcases
defaultActivities.description: Short demos where members present what they built and how it works.

defaultActivities.title: Community Circles
defaultActivities.description: Meet other student builders in Tanta and form teams for future projects.

faq.question: Who can join the event?
faq.answer: TThe event is open to high school students aged 13 to 18.

faq.question: Do I need prior experience?
faq.answer: No prior experience is required! Beginners and advanced participants are welcome.

faq.question: Is there a participation fee?
faq.answer: No, the event is completely free to attend.

faq.question: Will food and drinks be provided?
faq.answer: Yes! Complimentary snacks, drinks, and meals will be available throughout the day.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own equipment?
faq.answer: Participants should bring their own laptops.

faq.question: How can I register?
faq.answer: Sign up through our online registration form to secure your spot.

signup.title: Sign Up To Attend
signup.description: Registrations are live. Use the button below to join the Build Guild Tanta invite flow.

footer.credit: Built with Blueprint spirit by students in Tanta.
